items.title: Conversation practice
items.body:
Answer aloud first. Then complete the exercises.

Examples:
• Do you eat cheese or bread in the afternoon?
• Do you want to go downtown with me tomorrow?
• Do you work with your brother?
• When do you like to go to the park?
• 1- Where do you study? / work / play.

items.text: Do you eat cheese or bread in the afternoon?
Do you want to go downtown with me tomorrow?
Do you work with your brother?

items.answer: When do you like to go to the park?
1- Where do you study? / work / play.

items.text: Do you work with your brother?
